use_cases: Expandable action toolbar for productivity and creative applications
Dynamic tool palette with blur effects for secondary actions in editor interfaces
Collapsible navigation bar for space-efficient tool access in web apps
Interactive toolbar with hover states for inbox, messaging, or dashboard applications
ai_summary: A dynamic expandable toolbar component featuring motion animations and blur effects for secondary tools. Built with motion/react and Tailwind CSS, it provides a clean, interactive tool palette with hover states and click-to-expand functionality. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, creative tools, and productivity applications needing a space-efficient, animated toolbar interface.
